config.title: Informacje klienta o produkcie #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'std_openform_object_hli #include "50610"
'std_openform_field_hli #include "50200"
function polrab
trans_.var(APPVAR_POLRAB_PRODUKT) = clng(page_.root.klpr_pProdukt.idobj) trans_.var(APPVAR_POLRAB_KLIENT) = clng(page_.root.klpr_pKlient.idobj) trans_.var(APPVAR_POLRAB_TYP) = clng(N5POLRAB_TYP_CENA_NETTO) trans_.var(APPVAR_POLRAB_NAZWA) = "Cena ustalona" trans_.var(GVAR_CURSOR) = clng(CRSR_POLRAB_BY_PROD_KLI)
doc_.getmodule(60129).form_domodal TYPEID_N5POLRAB , 0 , USAGE_EDIT
'doc_.postcommand doc_.getmodule(60108).href_open_form_proxy(TYPEID_N5POLRAB,0)
end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Klient ,1)
XF_REF_DISPLAY_TEXT_WITH_OPEN(40,klpr_pKlient)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Produkt ,1)
XF_REF_DISPLAY_TEXT_WITH_OPEN(40,klpr_pProdukt)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_FIELD_REQ(Nazwa,CTRLID_NAZWA,40,klpr_strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_FIELD_REQ(Indeks,-1,40,klpr_strIndeks,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
klpr_listOpakowania
Opakowanie Kod kreskowy
klop_pOpakowanie strNazwa CRSR_DEFAULT
SXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,30,klop_strEAN)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
XFTABLEBUTTON(-1,Polityka rabatowa,polrab)
QXF_END
